2605.21443.title: TempGlitch: Evaluating Vision-Language Models for Temporal Glitch Detection in Gameplay Videos
2605.21443.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly being explored for video game quality assurance, especially gameplay glitch detection. Most existing evaluations, however, treat glitches as static visual anomalies, asking models to detect failures from a single frame. We argue that this framing misses a key distinction: some glitches are spatial and visible in an isolated frame, whereas others are temporal and become evident only through changes across ordered frames. A preliminary study confirms this gap, showing that temporal glitches are substantially harder for VLMs to detect than spatial ones. To enable systematic evaluation of this underexplored setting, we introduce TempGlitch, a controlled gameplay video benchmark for temporal glitch detection. TempGlitch covers five temporal glitch types with balanced per-category samples, together with paired glitch-free videos that enable reliable binary evaluation. We evaluate 12 proprietary and open-weight VLMs across multiple frame-sampling settings. Our results show that current VLMs remain near chance on TempGlitch, often collapsing into either overly conservative behavior that misses most glitches or overly sensitive behavior that flags clean videos as glitchy. Moreover, denser frame sampling and larger model size do not reliably resolve these failures. TempGlitch provides a focused testbed for temporal reasoning, robust gameplay understanding, and automated glitch detection with VLMs. Code and data are available at the project website.
2605.21443.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）正越來越多地被探索用於電子遊戲質量保證，特別是遊戲玩法故障檢測。 然而，大多數現有的評估將故障視為靜態視覺異常，要求模型從單一幀中檢測失敗。 我們認為這種框架忽略了一個關鍵的區別：一些故障是空間性的，並且在孤立的幀中可見，而另一些則是時間性的，僅通過有序幀之間的變化才會顯現出來。 一項初步研究證實了這一差距，顯示時間性故障對於 VLMs 的檢測明顯比空間性故障更困難。 為了系統地評估這一未被充分探索的設置，我們引入了 TempGlitch，一個用於時間性故障檢測的受控遊戲視頻基準。 TempGlitch 涵蓋了五種類型的時間性故障，並提供了平衡的每類樣本，以及配對的無故障視頻，以便進行可靠的二元評估。 我們在多個幀取樣設置下評估了 12 個專有和開放權重的 VLMs。 我們的結果顯示，當前的 VLMs 在 TempGlitch 上的表現接近隨機，經常陷入過於保守的行為，錯過大多數故障，或過於敏感的行為，將乾淨視頻標記為有故障。此外，更密集的幀取樣和更大的模型大小並不能可靠地解決這些失敗。 TempGlitch 提供了一個專注的測試平台，用於時間推理、穩健的遊戲理解和自動故障檢測，並與 VLMs 一起使用。 代碼和數據可在項目網站上獲得。
2605.21443.author: Yakun Yu et.al.
2605.21443.authors: Yakun Yu, Ashley Wiens, Adrián Barahona-Ríos, Benedict Wilkins, Saman Zadtootaghaj, Nabajeet Barman, Cor-Paul Bezemer
